name: sipi.bot Spend Firewall Agent
description: The spend firewall for autonomous AI agents. Evaluate every transaction against configurable rules before spending. Prevent runaway agent costs.

skills.name: Evaluate Transaction
skills.description: Evaluate an agent-initiated transaction against configurable spend rules: amount limits, vendor allowlists, frequency caps.

skills.name: Configure Spend Rules
skills.description: Set up spend rules: max per-transaction, monthly budget, vendor whitelist/blacklist, human approval thresholds.

skills.name: Audit Agent Spend
skills.description: Review all agent-initiated transactions with approvals, declines, and risk assessments.
